Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Could you come a little closer?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Ah, right there. That should be good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oh, good! It came out nicely this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}I wasn't here when everyone took pictures last time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I've wanted to get one with you since.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Technically, I could just capture video data through my eyes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}But in that situation, I wouldn't be able to appear in the picture myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Oh, I know it's a little late to be asking this, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}In that case, we should get a "silly one" next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I-I'm sorry if I made you uncomfortable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I think photographs are a truly amazing invention.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}They allow us to preserve a single moment in the endless flow of time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}This technology was born from a desire to preserve the experiences that are precious to us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Until recently, I was sad about the fact that I am a machine... That I'm so different from other people.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}But after telling you my feelings... I realized something.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}There is one thing only a machine with a human heart can do... That only I can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}No matter how clear our photos and records are, they can't preserve our feelings.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Data and memories aren't the same thing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Emotions can't be captured by a photograph. They can only continue to exist in our memories.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}But, we'll all have to say goodbye eventually. And someday, our memories will fade.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I'm going to keep my memories of everyone alive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Your experiences and feelings will continue to live on, inside of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I will never forget. Even if you all change, or if time ends up pulling us apart...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}That's one of my parts that had to be replaced after I collapsed at the Moonlight Bridge.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I asked Mitsuru-san to have it sent here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}I kept it hidden until recently, because it reminded me that I'm just a machine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Now, it's a symbol to show that I'll always remember you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}This is the proof of my resolve... and I want you to have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I want you to know that as long as I'm here, I will never leave you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}No matter how or when your life comes to an end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}At that moment, I will be by your side.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Everything that makes you who you are... will live on in my memories.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I am your friend, but I am also the machine that will keep your memory alive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Because this is something only I can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aigis has a genuine smile upon her face.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel a strong bond with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Aeon Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Metatron{f 0 1 27}, the attendant to the infinite![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Oh, welcome back... Were you hanging out together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}We ran into each other at the station and, well, I would've felt bad just leaving Junpei behind there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Uh-huh. You're just so thoughtful, aren'tcha?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Hehe. So, what were you and Aigis up to?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Oh, yeeeah! Ai-chan wasn't there last time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}I've actually been wondering for a while now, but what do you two usually talk about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Today, we were having a very fulfilling discussion about photographs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Oh, that's right! Why don't we all take a photo together, since we're here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Oooh, check it out, we got all the second-years here! Alright, I'm in, let's do it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Sure, but who's gonna take it? I don't think we can fit all five of us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Well, I guess we could just take turns![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Ah okay, I'll take the first shot. Where does everyone want to stand?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent a long time with everyone...[n]{f 1 1}
